name: hive-mcp-dispute
description: MCP server for the Hive Dispute Observer. Surfaces real arbitration signals from public sources (Kleros, UMA Optimistic Oracle, Reality.eth) and on-chain reversal patterns. Hive does NOT arbitrate, judge, freeze funds, or enforce dispute outcomes. Real rails. No mock data.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
